products.title: BREAKING STRONGHOLD FROM THE COURT OF HEAVEN
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Breaking Stronghold from the Court of Heaven by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a powerful Christian deliverance, spiritual warfare, and prayer resource that reveals how believers can overcome spiritual strongholds through the legal system of Heaven. As Volume 4 of The Mystery of Courtfare Series , this transformative book uncovers the hidden operations of strongholds, their legal foundations, and the biblical principles for securing lasting freedom through the Courts of Heaven. Drawing from deep scriptural insights and practical spiritual experiences, Prophet Isaiah Macwealth explains how strongholds operate through arguments, imaginations, false evidence, and legal rights that keep individuals trapped in cycles of failure, sickness, limitation, fear, oppression, and delayed breakthroughs. Readers will gain a deeper understanding of spiritual warfare, heavenly courts, satanic accusations, divine judgments, and how to enforce Christ’s victory through effective prayer and legal intercession. This book provides biblical strategies for identifying and dismantling strongholds, overcoming negative thought patterns, silencing the accusations of the enemy, breaking legal grounds used by darkness, and obtaining divine verdicts that bring healing, restoration, deliverance, and supernatural breakthroughs. It also offers profound teachings on spiritual authority, court of heaven prayer principles, repentance, and maintaining victory in Christ. Ideal for pastors, intercessors, deliverance ministers, prayer warriors, church leaders, and believers seeking freedom from spiritual bondage, Breaking Stronghold from the Court of Heaven is an essential guide for anyone desiring to walk in victory, exercise spiritual authority, and experience the fullness of God’s promises.

products.title: OBTAINING A CHANGE OF GARMENT FROM THE COURT OF HEAVEN
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Obtaining a Change of Garment from the Court of Heaven by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a powerful Christian spiritual warfare and deliverance book that unveils the mystery of spiritual garments, iniquity, transgression, and the believer’s access to divine justice through the Courts of Heaven. Drawing from deep biblical revelations, this transformational guide explains how unseen spiritual garments can influence destiny, affect prayer outcomes, hinder progress, and create recurring patterns of limitation, rejection, stagnation, and spiritual resistance. Through scriptural teachings and practical insights, readers will discover the reality of spiritual garments, the consequences of stained and limiting garments, the sources of inherited and acquired spiritual limitations, and the biblical process for obtaining a change of garment before God. The book explores the relationship between sin, transgression, iniquity, mercy, truth, and divine restoration, revealing how believers can overcome ancestral patterns, break cycles of limitation, and walk in greater spiritual authority. This book also provides profound teachings on maintaining spiritual purity, accessing higher realms of authority, prevailing in the Courts of Heaven, and positioning oneself for divine promotion and destiny fulfillment. Readers will gain practical understanding of how mercy and truth work together to purge iniquity and facilitate supernatural transformation. Perfect for pastors, intercessors, deliverance ministers, prayer warriors, church leaders, and believers seeking freedom from spiritual limitations, Obtaining a Change of Garment from the Court of Heaven is an essential resource for anyone desiring breakthrough, restoration, spiritual advancement, and victory through the power of Jesus Christ and the justice system of Heaven.

products.title: THE WHOLE ARMOUR OF GOD
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: The Whole Armour of God by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a powerful Christian spiritual warfare and discipleship book that reveals how believers can stand victorious against the schemes of the enemy by understanding and applying the full armour of God. Drawing from Ephesians 6 and other key biblical passages, this transformational guide provides practical insights into spiritual warfare, faith, righteousness, truth, salvation, prayer, and the believer’s authority in Christ. Through deep scriptural teachings and practical applications, readers will discover how to effectively use the Breastplate of Righteousness, Belt of Truth, Helmet of Salvation, Shield of Faith, Sword of the Spirit, and the power of prayer to overcome spiritual attacks and walk in daily victory. The book equips believers to remain spiritually alert, resist the enemy’s strategies, and maintain a strong and victorious Christian life. Perfect for pastors, ministers, prayer warriors, church leaders, and believers seeking a deeper understanding of spiritual warfare, The Whole Armour of God is an essential resource for building spiritual strength, developing unwavering faith, and living triumphantly through the power of Jesus Christ.

products.title: THE LANGUAGE OF THE PROPHETIC
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: The Language of the Prophetic by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a powerful Christian prophetic ministry book that unveils how God communicates spiritual information through visions, dreams, symbols, impressions, and prophetic encounters. Designed to help believers develop spiritual sensitivity, this insightful guide teaches readers how to receive, interpret, and accurately respond to divine communication. Through biblical teachings, practical examples, and prophetic insights, The Language of the Prophetic equips believers to understand the patterns, symbols, and spiritual languages through which God speaks. Whether you are a pastor, prophet, ministry leader, or believer seeking deeper spiritual discernment, this book provides valuable keys for recognizing God’s voice, decoding prophetic revelations, and growing in prophetic accuracy. Perfect for Christians passionate about the prophetic, spiritual growth, dreams and visions, divine guidance, and hearing God more clearly, this transformational resource will help you navigate the supernatural realm with greater understanding, confidence, and spiritual maturity.

products.title: CELL SYSTEM AND CHURCH GROWTH
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Cell System and Church Growth by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a practical and transformational guide for pastors, church leaders, ministry workers, and believers who desire to build thriving churches through an effective biblical cell system. Drawing from scriptural principles and proven ministry experience, this book reveals how small group ministry can become a powerful tool for church growth, discipleship, soul winning, leadership development, member retention, and community impact. In this insightful resource, readers will learn: The biblical foundation of the cell system and its role in the growth of the early church How to establish and manage effective church cells Strategies for implementing a cell structure in any ministry Leadership principles for cell leaders and ministry coordinators How to train, mentor, and develop productive cell leaders Practical methods for soul winning, follow-up, discipleship, and member care Systems for accountability, reporting, and leadership multiplication Proven models for church expansion and sustainable growth The 70–400 Church Growth Model for increasing church impact and membership Whether you are pioneering a new church, revitalizing an existing congregation, or seeking a structured approach to discipleship and church administration, Cell System and Church Growth provides actionable steps, training frameworks, and leadership tools to help you build a healthy, growing, and spiritually vibrant ministry. This book equips leaders to create strong relationships within the church, mobilize members for evangelism, and establish a culture of growth that produces lasting results.

products.title: CHURCH ADMINISTRATION AND FINANCES
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Church Administration and Finances by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a comprehensive Christian leadership and church management book that provides biblical principles for effectively handling church finances, administration, accountability, and ministry growth. Through practical wisdom and scriptural insights, this powerful guide equips pastors, church leaders, administrators, and ministry workers to manage God’s resources with integrity, excellence, and faithfulness. Covering topics such as church income, tithes and offerings, financial stewardship, budgeting, accountability systems, ministry expansion, leadership responsibility, and sustainable church growth, Church Administration and Finances offers a balanced approach to managing both the spiritual and practical aspects of ministry. This essential resource is perfect for pastors, church planters, ministry administrators, and Christian leaders seeking to build financially healthy, well-organized, and impactful ministries that advance the Kingdom of God.

Perfect for Christians, pastors, ministers, and anyone seeking healing, wellness, and spiritual growth, this book provides practical keys to living in strength, vitality, and divine health through Christ.

products.title: GROWING A NEW CHURCH
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Growing a New Church by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a practical and insightful guide for pastors, church planters, ministry leaders, and Christian workers who desire to build a thriving, growing, and impactful church from the ground up. Drawing from biblical principles, ministry experience, and proven church growth strategies, this book provides a comprehensive roadmap for establishing strong foundations, attracting new members, retaining believers, and developing a healthy church culture. In this powerful church growth resource, readers will discover: The essential principles for growing a new church successfully How to create systems for member retention and discipleship The foundations of a healthy and sustainable church culture The importance of prayer, sound doctrine, consistency, and church service excellence Strategies for taking a church to the next level of influence and impact ….and lots more. Whether you are starting a new ministry, revitalizing a struggling congregation, or seeking practical church growth solutions, Growing a New Church offers biblical wisdom and actionable steps to help you build a strong, united, and flourishing church. This book equips leaders to overcome common church planting challenges, establish effective ministry structures, and create an environment where people can grow spiritually and remain committed to God’s purpose. Perfect for pastors, church planters, ministry students, leadership training programs, and Christian organizations, this book serves as a valuable handbook for anyone passionate about church growth, discipleship, evangelism, and kingdom expansion.

products.title: HOW TO RELEASE THE HEALING POWER OF GOD
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: How to Release the Healing Power of God by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a powerful Christian healing and supernatural ministry book that reveals biblical principles for ministering divine healing and demonstrating the power of God. Covering topics such as faith for healing, the anointing, miracles, laying on of hands, the gifts of the Holy Spirit, and ministering healing with confidence, How to Release the Healing Power of God empowers Christians to become effective channels of God’s healing grace. products.title: RECOGNIZING THE VOICE OF GOD
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Recognizing the Voice of God by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a powerful Christian spiritual growth book that teaches believers how to hear, discern, and understand God’s voice clearly. Through biblical teachings and practical spiritual insights, this transformational guide reveals how God speaks through His Word, the Holy Spirit, dreams, visions, impressions, and divine direction, helping readers grow in intimacy with God and make Spirit-led decisions. Perfect for believers seeking spiritual sensitivity, divine guidance, prophetic understanding, and a deeper relationship with God, this book provides practical keys for discerning God’s voice, overcoming confusion, strengthening faith, and walking confidently in God’s purpose and direction for your life.

products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Rediscovering Fellowship & Devotion by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a powerful Christian spiritual growth book that calls believers back to a life of intimate fellowship with God and wholehearted devotion to Christ. Perfect for Christians, pastors, ministry leaders, and anyone seeking spiritual renewal, this inspiring book provides practical keys to living a passionate, Spirit-filled, and God-centered life.

products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Ignite a deeper passion for God with Burning for the Lord by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth — a powerful Christian book designed to awaken spiritual hunger, revival fire, and wholehearted devotion to Jesus Christ. Whether you are seeking revival, spiritual renewal, or a stronger relationship with God, Burning for the Lord provides timeless principles to help you sustain your fire for God in a world filled with distractions. Discover how to: Build a passionate prayer life Maintain spiritual fire and consistency Grow in intimacy with God Overcome spiritual coldness and complacency Live a life fully surrendered to Christ Perfect for personal devotion, Bible study groups, discipleship, and spiritual growth journeys. Burning for the Lord will inspire you to pursue God with fresh passion and unwavering commitment.

products.title: COURTFARE – ADVANCED PRAYER SERIES
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Courtfare – Advanced Prayer Series is a powerful and revelatory guide by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth that uncovers the spiritual legal system behind battles faced by believers. This life-transforming book reveals that Satan does not only fight through warfare but also through courtfare —operating through legal accusations and spiritual permissions in the courts of heaven. Many Christians suffer unnecessary attacks, delays, losses, and frustrations because they do not understand how spiritual jurisdiction works. In this advanced prayer and spiritual warfare book, readers will discover how the heavenly court system operates and how to secure victory through repentance, petition, persistence, and the advocacy of Jesus Christ—our Senior Advocate. Through deep biblical insights and practical spiritual principles, Courtfare equips believers to break satanic legal grounds, overturn negative verdicts, and obtain favorable judgments in the courts of heaven. Inside this book, you will learn: The Mystery of Heavenly Courts and Courtfare The Accuser and his strategy against believers The transforming power of repentance How to present effective spiritual petitions Why persistence is necessary in prayer The role of Jesus Christ as our Advocate How to gain legal victory in spiritual battles Biblical strategies for overcoming demonic accusations …and lots more! Perfect for believers, intercessors, prayer warriors, ministers, and anyone seeking deeper understanding of spiritual warfare, Courtfare – Advanced Prayer Series is a must-read for those who desire victory, freedom, restoration, and spiritual authority through prayer.

Perfect for entrepreneurs, leaders, believers, professionals, and anyone seeking personal growth, financial breakthrough, and mental transformation, Your Mind, Your Prosperity provides powerful biblical and practical strategies for achieving prosperity from the inside out and living a successful, impactful, and abundant life.

products.title: THE MYSTERY OF SPIRITUAL FATHERHOOD

Perfect for pastors, church leaders, ministers, disciples, and believers seeking spiritual growth and leadership maturity, The Mystery of Spiritual Fatherhood provides biblical wisdom for building healthy spiritual relationships and thriving in God’s divine purpose.

products.title: UNDERSTANDING PRAYER
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Understanding Prayer by Prophet Isaiah MacWealth is a powerful Christian prayer guide that provides a clear, biblical understanding of prayer and its vital role in the life of every believer. Since the quality of our understanding determines the effectiveness of our prayers, this book simplifies the subject of prayer and reveals the spiritual principles that produce consistent results. Through profound scriptural insights, Prophet Isaiah Macwealth unveils the multifaceted chambers of God and teaches believers how to approach Him effectively to receive answers to their prayers. Readers will gain practical knowledge on building a vibrant prayer life, deepening their fellowship with God, and praying with confidence and understanding. In this transformational book, you will discover: Prayer as a Right and Privilege The Functions of Prayer Creating a Prayer Channel Maintaining a Prayer Channel Keys to Effective and Answered Prayer Principles for Developing a Consistent Prayer Life Whether you are a new believer or a seasoned Christian seeking greater results in prayer, Understanding Prayer will equip you with biblical wisdom and practical tools to strengthen your relationship with God and experience a more powerful and effective prayer life.

products.title: THE MYSTERY OF THANKSGIVING
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: The Mystery of Thanksgiving by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a powerful Christian book that reveals the life-changing power of thanksgiving and its role in unlocking continuous testimonies, divine favor, and supernatural breakthroughs. While many believers are quick to present requests before God, few understand the spiritual mystery of gratitude and how a lifestyle of thanksgiving can sustain God’s blessings and attract greater manifestations of His goodness. Through biblical teachings and practical insights, Prophet Isaiah Macwealth uncovers the different dimensions of thanksgiving and shows believers how to make thanksgiving a powerful spiritual tool for victory, increase, and deeper fellowship with God. In this transformative book, you will learn: The Prayer of Thanksgiving Mobilized Thanksgiving Fruit Thanksgiving Magnification Thanksgiving Dedication Thanksgiving How to Execute Thanksgiving in Your Life Biblical Principles for Living a Life of Gratitude Keys to Unlocking Continuous Testimonies Whether you desire a deeper relationship with God, greater spiritual maturity, or a life filled with testimonies and divine favor, The Mystery of Thanksgiving provides practical and biblical keys for cultivating a heart of gratitude and experiencing the supernatural benefits of thanksgiving.

Perfect for Christians, entrepreneurs, ministers, and anyone seeking divine intervention and financial advancement through biblical principles.

The book provides valuable insights into leadership, vision, discipleship, church growth, pastoral responsibility, and maintaining a strong connection to God’s divine assignment. Whether you are launching a new church, overseeing a branch ministry, or preparing for a future pastoral assignment, Church Pioneering in Ministry equips you with the knowledge, wisdom, and spiritual understanding needed to build a healthy, impactful, and enduring ministry that advances the Kingdom of God.

Through deep biblical insights and practical teachings, this eye-opening resource reveals how the enemy operates through strife, rebellion, division, offense, and disunity to hinder church growth and spiritual progress. Readers will learn how to identify Satan’s hidden operations, overcome internal conflicts, and cultivate the unity of faith that empowers the church to fulfill its divine mandate. In this book, you will discover: Satan’s Anti-Church Strategy Satan’s Sabotage Strategy Satan’s Strife Strategy Satan’s Rebellion Strategy The Anatomy of Strife The Unity of the Faith Keys to Preserving Church Unity Biblical Principles for Defeating Division and Conflict Whether you are a pastor, church leader, ministry worker, or committed believer, Satan: The Hidden Enemy of Your Church provides the spiritual understanding and practical tools needed to protect your church from the enemy’s schemes and foster a culture of unity, growth, and kingdom impact.

Whether you are a new believer seeking to build a strong prayer foundation or a mature Christian desiring greater effectiveness in prayer, this transformational guide provides biblical keys for developing a vibrant prayer life, hearing God’s voice, strengthening your faith, and experiencing supernatural breakthroughs.

products.title: THE MYSTERY OF CROWNS AND ETERNAL REWARDS

Readers will discover that life on earth is God’s training ground for eternity and that every act of faithfulness has eternal significance. In this transformative book, you will learn: Earth: The University of the Kingdom Kingdom Business and Divine Preparation The Rapture and Eternal Rewards Graduation, Certificates, and Crowns The Crown of Life The Crown of Glory The Crown of Righteousness The Crown of Rejoicing How to Fight for and Secure Your Crown Whether you desire a deeper understanding of God’s Kingdom, eternal rewards, spiritual growth, or faithful Christian living, The Mystery of Crowns and Eternal Rewards provides practical biblical wisdom for living a life that will be rewarded both now and in eternity.

Whether you are a pastor, ministry leader, prayer warrior, Spirit-filled believer, or someone hungry for a deeper walk with God, this book will help you cultivate the habit of living, walking, and functioning in the Spirit consistently.

products.title: RETAINING THE HEALING YOU HAVE RECEIVED

products.title: GOD WANTS YOU TO PROSPER
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: God Wants You to Prosper by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a life-changing Christian prosperity and financial empowerment book that reveals God’s desire for believers to experience abundance, success, and financial freedom. products.title: ENGAGING SPIRITUAL PRAYERS
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Discover a life-changing guide to powerful, scripture-based prayer in Engaging Spiritual Prayers by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth . This transformational Christian book explores the prayers of biblical patriarchs, Jesus Christ, Apostle Paul, and the ministry of the Holy Spirit to help believers deepen their relationship with God and experience spiritual growth, breakthrough, and divine empowerment. Through practical teachings and revelatory insights, readers will learn how to pray effectively, overcome spiritual battles, build intimacy with God, walk in divine purpose, and activate the power of the Holy Spirit through prayer and intercession. From the prayers of David to the teachings of Jesus and the apostolic prayers of Paul, this book provides biblical principles for victorious Christian living, faith, healing, spiritual maturity, and supernatural strength. Perfect for believers, prayer warriors, ministry leaders, and anyone seeking a deeper prayer life, this book will inspire you to pray with confidence, authority, wisdom, and spiritual understanding. Whether you are seeking spiritual revival, guidance, healing, breakthrough, or a stronger connection with God, Engaging Spiritual Prayers is a must-read resource for every Christian believer.

products.title: ACCESSING THE HIDDEN POWERS OF HEAVEN
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Accessing the Hidden Powers of Heaven by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a powerful Christian spiritual growth and supernatural living book that unveils the mysteries of God’s holiness, divine power, worship, and the believer’s capacity to partake in the nature of God. Through profound biblical revelations and practical spiritual insights, this transformative guide explains how holiness is connected to God’s power and how believers can access greater dimensions of divine encounters, miracles, healing, and supernatural manifestation. Exploring topics such as holiness, sanctification, the Creator’s power, the beauty of holiness, worship, and partaking of God’s divine nature, Accessing the Hidden Powers of Heaven equips believers to cultivate deeper intimacy with God and walk in higher realms of spiritual authority. Perfect for pastors, ministers, prayer warriors, and Christians seeking revival, supernatural power, and deeper fellowship with God, this book provides practical keys to experiencing the glory, presence, and transforming power of Heaven.

products.title: UNLOCKING YOUR DESTINY FROM THE COURT OF HEAVEN
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Unlock the mysteries of destiny, purpose, and spiritual restoration with Unlocking Your Destiny from the Court of Heaven by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth — a powerful Christian book on spiritual warfare, destiny fulfillment, and prayer from the courts of heaven. Through deep biblical revelations and practical spiritual insights, this life-transforming guide teaches believers how to overcome satanic limitations, break generational curses, deal with iniquity, and access divine judgment in the heavenly courts for destiny recovery and fulfillment. In this revelatory book, you will discover the mysteries of purpose, glory, destiny, crowns, and spiritual “roofs” that influence a person’s life. Learn how soul ties, curses, iniquity, and spiritual legalities can hinder your progress, and how to engage the courts of heaven through prayer, repentance, holiness, and prophetic understanding to unlock your God-ordained future. Perfect for believers seeking spiritual growth, deliverance, breakthrough prayers, and a deeper understanding of heavenly justice, this book provides biblical wisdom, prayer strategies, and prophetic teachings to help you walk in divine purpose and victory. Whether you are a pastor, intercessor, prayer warrior, or Christian hungry for deeper revelation, this book will equip you to contend for your prophetic destiny and prevail spiritually.

products.title: COURTFARE OR WARFARE
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Courtfare or Warfare by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a powerful Christian spiritual warfare and prayer book that unveils the biblical mystery of the Courts of Heaven and their role in determining outcomes on earth. This eye-opening guide teaches believers how to move beyond traditional spiritual warfare into the realm of “courtfare”—presenting their case before God, the righteous Judge, to obtain divine verdicts, breakthrough, and victory. Through profound scriptural insights, readers will discover how Satan operates as an accuser in the heavenly courts, how repentance and the blood of Jesus silence legal accusations, and how to effectively present petitions before God. The book explores key themes such as the power of repentance, understanding spiritual accusations, persistence in prayer, the role of Jesus as our Advocate, and the legal dimensions of spiritual battles. Ideal for believers seeking deliverance, answered prayers, spiritual authority, and deeper revelation, Courtfare or Warfare provides practical biblical principles for overcoming opposition, securing favorable judgments in the Courts of Heaven, and walking in lasting victory through Christ. This transformational resource is essential for anyone desiring a more effective and results-oriented prayer life.

products.title: WHY WE GO TO CHURCH
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Why We Go to Church by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a life-changing Christian book that unveils the true identity, purpose, authority, and significance of the Church in God’s eternal plan. In a time when many view the Church as merely a social organization, charity, business, or religious institution, this powerful biblical guide restores a clear understanding of what the Church truly is and why every believer needs to be actively connected to it. Through profound scriptural insights, Prophet Isaiah Macwealth explores the Church as the Body of Christ, the Bride of Christ, the Family of God, and the Lord’s spiritual army. Readers will gain a deeper understanding of church membership, spiritual authority, the fivefold ministry, church government, and their unique role in advancing God’s Kingdom on earth. Whether you are a new believer, church worker, ministry leader, or mature Christian seeking greater revelation, Why We Go to Church will strengthen your commitment to God’s house and empower you to fulfill your divine purpose within the Body of Christ.

products.title: DISARMING THE DEVIL IN PRAYER
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Disarming the Devil in Prayer by Prophet Isaiah Macwealth is a powerful Christian prayer, spiritual warfare, and deliverance book that equips believers with biblical strategies for overcoming satanic opposition and securing victory through effective prayer. Drawing from Scripture and practical spiritual insights, this transformational guide reveals the divine instruments God has given believers to disarm the enemy and activate heaven’s intervention in every area of life. Through in-depth teachings on fasting, communion, the name of Jesus, the blood of Jesus, the Word of God, sacrifice, and faith, readers will discover how to strengthen their prayer life, break spiritual strongholds, release divine power, and walk in authority over the works of darkness. The book provides practical wisdom for developing a results-driven prayer life and experiencing greater spiritual victory. Whether you are seeking breakthrough, deliverance, healing, protection, or a deeper understanding of spiritual warfare, Disarming the Devil in Prayer offers biblical principles and powerful revelations to help you pray with confidence, overcome the enemy, and live a victorious Christian life through the power of Jesus Christ.

products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth

This insightful guide reveals the vital role of the anointing in successful ministry, teaching readers how to move beyond natural ability and operate through divine empowerment. Drawing from powerful biblical examples and practical spiritual principles, the book explains the difference between the anointing within and the anointing upon, the benefits of walking in the anointing, and how believers can continually cultivate a deeper relationship with the Holy Spirit. Readers will discover how to activate spiritual power, hear God’s voice, develop spiritual sensitivity, pray effectively, and minister with greater boldness and impact. Whether you serve in teaching, evangelism, pastoral care, administration, or any area of church ministry, The Anointing for Lay Ministry provides practical wisdom for growing in spiritual authority, avoiding common pitfalls that hinder the anointing, and becoming a more effective vessel for God’s purposes. This book is an essential resource for every believer who desires to serve God with power, excellence, and lasting kingdom impact.

In this insightful book, readers will discover: The true purpose and assignment of the Church The ministry of reconciliation and soul winning The importance of evangelism, teaching, and missions The missionary mindset and church expansion strategies The role of believers in advancing God’s Kingdom The eternal destiny and course of the Church Perfect for pastors, church leaders, missionaries, ministry workers, Bible school students, and believers passionate about church growth and Kingdom advancement, The Purpose of Your Church equips readers with practical and spiritual understanding to build impactful ministries and fulfill the Great Commission according to God’s divine plan.

Perfect for pastors, evangelists, church leaders, discipleship groups, ministry workers, and every believer passionate about soul winning, this book serves as a comprehensive manual for Christian evangelism, church growth, discipleship, and kingdom advancement. products.title: THE MORNING ALTAR WARRIOR
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: Every morning, before the demands of life begin, Heaven opens a window of divine opportunity. It is a sacred moment when God releases fresh mercy, wisdom, direction, strength, provision, and supernatural grace for the day ahead. Yet, many believers sleep through this divine appointment, unaware of the life-changing encounters that await them at the morning altar. In The Morning Altar Warrior, Prophet Isaiah Macwealth unveils the biblical mystery of the morning altar, revealing why the morning is God’s appointed time for divine visitation, spiritual transactions, prophetic direction, and supernatural empowerment. Drawing from the Scriptures and years of ministry experience, he demonstrates that the morning altar is far more than a devotional routine—it is a place of fellowship, legislation, transformation, spiritual authority, and divine encounters. Through fifteen life-transforming chapters, you will journey from understanding the foundations of the morning altar to cultivating a lifestyle of consecration, prevailing prayer, spiritual authority, supernatural harvest, and consistent victory. You will discover how to recognize God’s daily visitation, engage the mystery of the morning watch, build an altar that attracts divine fire, enforce spiritual transactions, protect your destiny, and walk in the glory of a consistent morning altar warrior. More than a book on prayer, this is a divine invitation to become a warrior of the morning—one who knows how to meet with God before the world awakens, receive divine intelligence for the day, prevail in spiritual battles, and walk in uncommon victory. Whether you are a new believer seeking intimacy with God, a minister longing for fresh fire, or a seasoned Christian pursuing greater dimensions of spiritual authority, this book will equip you with timeless biblical truths and practical spiritual principles to build an altar that attracts God’s presence and sustains a lifetime of victory. Every morning is a divine appointment. The altar is waiting. Heaven is ready. Rise, meet with God, and become a true Morning Altar Warrior.

products.title: TEST
products.author: Dr. Isaiah Macwealth
products.description: TEST
